{{Quote|Borgles are more than mean. It's like they're evil right down to their core. Maybe because of all the time they spend in their caves, in the dark.|Fingers|<ref name="TRoD">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]''</ref>}}
'''Borgle bats''' were large, nocturnal creatures native to the caves of [[Rori/Legends|Rori]], one of the moons of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. Being carnivorous creatures, they were known for capturing living prey and bringing them back to their warrens, where they would slowly drain the bodies of blood. They would then stack the bones of their victims in large cairns within their prescribed nesting area.

The borgles were not believed to be originally native to Rori. Their homeworld was a mystery, but they also occurred on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]].

==History==
{{Quote|You must help me! My husband was telling our kids about the caves filled with Borgles, and it seems they went off to go see the caves firsthand. I'm afraid the worst has happened to them!|A commoner, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:ac">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=herald|a commoner|Rori}}</ref>}}
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a colony made of an extraordinary number of borgle bats lived in a [[Borgle Bat Cave|cave]] on the [[Naboo/Legends|Nabooian]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Rori/Legends|Rori]].<ref name="SWG:BBC" />

Brave animal handlers would often attempt to capture borgle bats for the use of arena pit-fighting. The [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] "[[Fingers]]" specialized in borgle-wrangling lost fingers to an unmanageable Borgle. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] the Imperial bioengineers known as [[Dusque Mistflier]] and [[Tendau Nandon]] traveled to Rori to explore the Borgle bat caves. They discovered an oversized female Borgle bat protecting a nest for their young.<ref name="TRoD" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Borgle_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Borgle bats appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
